source_window_freshness_confidence.source: backend/src/routes/attribution.ts:1104 buildConfirmedPurchaseNoSendPreview + ConfirmedPurchasePrep same-window input artifacts + Path B order bridge ledger module

purpose: campaign_id missing 2,121건이 다음 sprint에 자동으로 줄어들도록, 운영DB PAYMENT_COMPLETE + NPay actual confirmed + Path B bridge evidence + paid_click_intent ledger + Google Ads click_view를 한 input pipeline으로 합치는 구조를 설계한다.

evidence_sources_currently_joined: Google Ads click_view (별도 batch script로 join, runtime 합침 없음)
evidence_sources_NOT_joined_yet: paid_click_intent_ledger (backend/src/paidClickIntentLog.ts) — order에 click_id 없을 때 hash 매칭으로 campaign 후보 도출 가능
order_bridge_ledger (backend/src/orderBridgeLedger.ts) — Path B canary write 활성 시 hashed bridge row 누적
operational PG payment_complete window — primary_confirmed_source 인증

bottleneck_root_cause.primary_root_cause: imweb 주문 테이블에 gclid/gbraid/wbraid가 보존되지 않아 buildConfirmedPurchaseNoSendPreview 호출 시점에 click_identifiers가 비어 있다. 결과적으로 click_view exact join 후보 자체가 31건으로 고정.
bottleneck_root_cause.secondary_root_cause: paid_click_intent_ledger와 order_bridge_ledger를 동일 confirmed order key로 cross-reference하는 함수가 없다.

patch_candidate_1.name: buildConfirmedPurchaseNoSendPreview에 cross_reference_evidence 필드 추가
behavior: input click_identifiers가 비어 있을 때, hashed identity material(email/phone/order)을 기반으로 paid_click_intent_ledger와 order_bridge_ledger에서 same-order exact match를 lookup
exact match가 있으면 evidence={category: 'A_click_present_via_ledger', source_table, click_id_type, hash_prefix} 를 추가
exact match가 없으면 evidence={category: 'B~G', blocker_reason} 를 추가
patch_candidate_1.code_change_estimate_loc: 약 60 LOC (이번 sprint 미적용, design only)

patch_candidate_2.name: ConfirmedPurchaseBuilder same-window input pipeline에 4 evidence merge step 추가
patch_candidate_2.scope: backend script (별도 builder, runtime endpoint와 분리)
behavior: same-window input 생성 시 operational PG payment_complete + Path B ledger summary + paid_click_intent ledger + Google Ads click_view 30d를 join 단계로 명시
각 row에 confidence={A,B,C,D}와 reason field 부여
patch_candidate_2.code_change_estimate_loc: 약 120 LOC (이번 sprint 미적용, design only)

no_actual_purchase_promotion.primary_confirmed_source: operational PG payment_complete + admin confirmed flag

fixture_dry_run_plan.verification_method: fixture JSON → buildConfirmedPurchaseNoSendPreview + (proposed) cross_reference_evidence → block_reasons / category 비교

result_summary.next_green_action: fixture 4개 작성 + (proposed) cross_reference_evidence 함수 stub PR draft. 본 sprint 다음 sprint(gpt0508-35)에서 진행 예정.
result_summary.yellow_proposal: patch_candidate_1을 별도 sprint에서 fixture test PASS 후 backend route에 wire.
